title: Zoflora 96 Antibacterial Multi-Surface Cleaning Midnight Blooms Large Wipes
features: BURSTING WITH FRAGRANCE: Midnight Blooms is bursting with mystical and seductive notes, combining oriental roses and orange blossoms with rich, dark amber tones.

KILLS 99.9% OF VIRUSES & BACTERIA: Zoflora’s cleaning wipes kill bacteria and viruses, helping to protect your family from potentially harmful germs, whilst also eliminating odours to leave homes beautifully fragrant all day.

QUICK & EFFECTIVE CLEANING: Zoflora disinfectant cleaning wipes are designed for fast and efficient cleaning, offering a convenient format that allows you to tackle messes with ease. Whether you're at home or on the go, these wipes provide a quick solution for maintaining cleanliness, hygiene, and freshness.

BIODEGRADABLE: Zoflora Biodegradable Antibacterial Multi-Surface Cleaning Wipes are a convenient format designed for quick, effective cleaning around your home or, on the go. Bursting with fragrance, each biodegradable wipe is made from 100% plant-based fibres from responsibly managed sources. *Biodegrade in 15 days in active landfill conditions.

MULTI-SURFACE: The convenient, ready-to-use disinfectant wipes both provide powerful antibacterial and antiviral protection, making them the perfect choice for maintaining cleanliness in high-traffic areas and on hard surfaces throughout your home, including cookers, hobs, sinks, taps, and bins. They ensure a thorough clean while delivering reliable germ protection.
ALSO AVAILABLE IN: Explore a variety of perfumer-developed fragrances including Linen Fresh, Midnight Blooms, Lemon Zing, Springtime all available in a 96pk.

DIRECTIONS: For effective disinfection wipe directly onto surfaces ensuring full coverage. To kill 99.9% of enveloped viruses and bacteria allow a contact time of 5 minutes. Pre-cleaning is not required.

EXPLORE THE ZOFLORA RANGE: Discover a diverse selection of captivating fragrances and specialized formulations within the Zoflora range, offering an array of choices to suit your cleaning needs. From bathroom cleaners that provide effective and hygienic cleaning to floor wipes that maintain cleanliness and freshness, and multi-purpose sprays that offer versatile cleaning solutions.
description: Product Description Wipes: Zoflora’s antibacterial multi-surface wipes are the solution to kill 99.9% of viruses and bacteria, offering effective protection for your family against harmful germs while eliminating odors and leaving your home beautifully fragrant throughout the day. These cleaning wipes are designed for quick and efficient cleaning, allowing you to tackle messes with ease whether you’re at home or on the go. With their convenient, portable format, Zoflora wipes provide a fast and effective solution for maintaining cleanliness, hygiene, and freshness in any situation. Not only do they provide a high standard of hygiene, but Zoflora’s biodegradable antibacterial wipes are also made with 100% plant-based fibres sourced from responsibly managed sources, ensuring that they biodegrade in 15 days under active landfill conditions, making them an eco-friendly choice for your home. These wipes are versatile and can be used on a variety of hard surfaces throughout your home, including cookers and hobs, sinks and taps, pet areas, and bins, allowing you to maintain a clean and hygienic environment no matter where the mess is. The wipes are specially formulated to leave surfaces hygienically clean, and for effective disinfection, simply wipe directly onto surfaces ensuring full coverage. To kill 99.9% of enveloped viruses and bacteria, a contact time of 5 minutes is recommended to ensure the area is fully sanitized. Whether you're wiping down kitchen surfaces or cleaning high-touch areas, Zoflora wipes offer a quick, convenient, and powerful way to keep your home fresh and clean. Additionally, Zoflora offers a wide range of products to cater to all your cleaning needs, including bathroom cleaners that provide effective and hygienic cleaning, floor wipes that maintain cleanliness and freshness, and multi-purpose sprays that offer versatile solutions for any surface. Explore the full Zoflora range to discover a variety of captivating fragrances and specialized formulations, all designed to suit your cleaning needs and keep your home smelling fresh and clean. With Zoflora, you can enjoy a convenient, effective, and environmentally friendly cleaning experience while ensuring a hygienic and fragrant environment in your home. Ingredients Per 100g liquid: 0.25g Benzalkonium Chloride, <5% Non-ionic surfactants, Benzisothiazolinone, Octylisothiazolinone, Isotridecanol Ethoxylate and concentrated perfume compound Manufacturer Contact Information Thornton & Ross Ltd., Huddersfield, HD7 5QH, UK.
